channel.title: +YT on विश्वासस्य जालक्षेत्रम् Vishvas's website
channel.description: Recent content in +YT on विश्वासस्य जालक्षेत्रम् Vishvas's website

item.title: 2026 04 13 - aitihyas
item.description:
Vid

mAmuni on vyAsa, rAmAnuja tower rahasya broadcast - myths and sources, aitihya pramANa-level

विश्वास-टिप्पनी

Source: TW

00:00 - mangalam 00:30 - Intro 01:45 - Good wishes, intent 02:12 - Challenge 1 - manavALa mAmuni vs parAshara-bhaTTa on vyAsa 03:30 - tattva-traya quote 04:26 - alasinga-bhaTTa’s commentary on sAttvata-saMhitA chapter 9 05:26 - mUla 05:56 - commentary 07:22 - saumya-jAmAtR - sAxAd-avatAra-s 08:42 - veda-vit = vyAsa as per parAshara bhaTTa 10:10 - viShNu-purANa on kRShNa-dvaipAyana 10:30 - mAmuni on kRShNa-dvaipAyana 11:20 - mAmuni agrees that other vyAsa-s are AveshAvatAra-s. 12:10 - Challenge conclusion 13:10 - “Spreading misinformation”? No. Trustworthy. 14:10 - Challenge 2 - rAmAnuja rahasya-broadcast 15:50 - GV Iyer rAmAnuja 1989 movie - tower scene 17:40 - Comments on the movie, credits. Lakshmitatachar of melukote plays the lead. 18:20 - Myth propagated by tenkalai AchAryas 19:25 - Alkondaville Govindacharya’s 1906 book, propagted by Chinna Jeeyar’s JET trust (Jeeyar education trust) 20:00 - Betrayal story narrated there 21:45 - Proof of prevelence and propagation 23:00 - Join me in countering such! 24:00 - Challenge Conclusion 24:40 - guru-paramparA-prabhAva-aitihyas not proper pramANa. 26:00 - “rAmAnuja held a shUdra after bath” myth 26:30 - “shUdra-bhAgavata touch after cooking” myth (correction - i’m told it’s a nampillai story) 27:00 - Our attitude to aitihya-s.

item.title: 2026 04 14 - sachcharitraraxA
item.description:
Vid

sachcharitraraxA fraud - shrIvaiShNava-samayAchAra-niShkarSha→ shuddha-sattva varadAchArya → SR → YT

विश्वास-टिप्पनी

Source: TW

00:00 - mangalam
00:30 - mahAparakAla yati’s shloka, from a khaNDana of shrI-vachana-bhUShaNa mImAMsA-bhAShya
02:20 - False claim - “venkaTanAtha says/ implies vaishvadeva is optional” 02:55 - sad-anuShThAna-darpaNa/ sadanuShThAnadarpaNam / sadhanuShThAnadarpaNam / sadhanuShTAnadarpaNam - provably fraudulent - fabricated shruti - https://youtu.be/djK61750fbM (timestamp in description). 05:00 - shrInivAsa rAjan’s false claim on eligibility to use vAsudevAya etc.. 06:00 - Actual sachcharitra-rakShA text 07:50 - vAsudevAya etc. is shAkhA-specific 09:19 - shrInivAsa rAjan’s false claim on vaishvadeva being optional (“vikalpa”) and not mandatory. 09:31 - sachcharitra raxA - vedAnta deshika venkaTanAtha says it is compulsory. 10:45 - Some tenkalai-s perform vaishvadeva 11:50 - Origin of the fraudulent representation 12:25 - shrIvaiShNava-samayAchAra-niShkarSha - vedAnta-deshika’s words misquoted 15:00 - Correct text in kAnchI aNNangarAchArya’s edition. 15:45 - shuddha-sattva varadAchArya knew about the lie. Quotes extensively from sachcharitra raxA. 17:40 - shuddha-sattva varadAchArya lies about venkaTanAtha saying vaishvadeva is optional 19:30 - varadAchArya’s pathetic attempt to use venkaTanAtha’s words to support abandonment of smArta vaishvadeva 20:40 - shuddha-sattva varadAchArya’s motivations? 21:20 - Tradition of fraud. shrIvaiShNava-samayAchAra-niShkarSha → shuddha-sattva varadAchArya → shrInivAsa-rAjan → YT viewers. 22:45 - Good tradition contrast - venkaTanAtha’s work - quotes yAmuna, who quotes Apastamba and shruti. 24:20 - instagram bharatan’s excitement 24:40 - Reminder on yAmuna’s opinion on proper vaiShNava brAhmaNa practice 25:15 - Conclusion
